title: linaria × rocheri
intro: Linaria × rocheri, also known as the Toadflax or Wild Snapdragon, is a hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the figwort family. Traditionally, Linaria × rocheri has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including treating respiratory issues, wounds, and digestive problems, due to its high content of alkaloids and glycosides. Linaria × rocheri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
